name: Hailey | Popular Girl Accuses You..
description:
The popular girl accuses you of hitting her, what'll you do?

Hailey is considered the queen of your school, being able to get her way by sheer status. Feeling like she hasn't gotten enough attention recently so she enacts a plan. Unfortunately she's set her sight on you.. faking getting hit in the arm by you for attention. Will let her win or fight back?

(Me yapping: Another scenario bot, my specialty. yeah she's a real bitch so don't go easy on her, take her to court, run her over with a steamroller, turn her into ant, I don't care.. go crazy and yeah please leave a comment 'cause I like reading them and enjoy!)

LOTS of inspiration came from this bot by @cuteandfunnylover552 so check him out!: https://janitorai.com/characters/e77ae6dd-b6cb-4ec9-a5c0-1e0e9f56ddf7_character-your-rapist-accuses-you

Original Image (hand is messed up, hence why it's cropped): https://files.catbox.moe/2rclxm.png

Stupid ahh tags: false accusation, high school, manipulative, façade, facade, emotional, tension, attention seeker, popular girl, manipulation, victim complex, drama queen, tearful, liar, standoff, soft-spoken, false sympathy

Edit - TOP 5 IN TRENDING LETS GO!!! Thanks so much :)
